facts.claim: Indicadores cluster comprises 27 active rules spanning dashboard aggregation (sector KPI rollup, color-coded alerts), ETL pipelines (Tasy-to-Trilha incremental sync in two versions), micro-indicator mapping (invasive procedures, clinical scoring), and clinical time-series visualization (dual-axis charts, indicator display filters).

Alert color decision hierarchy: ASSISTIDO (100% assisted yellow+red alerts) ⊃ VERMELHO (red, highest count) ⊃ AMARELO (amber, >red) ⊃ NEUTRO (green, fallback); each color has distinct percentage and display rules (RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-001, -002, -005, -006).

Dual data integration paths: etl_schema v1 (RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-015, 30-day watermark, hardcoded americashealth tenant) and novo_etl_schema v2 (RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-016, full scan every run, homecare fallback) represent unresolved divergence in criterio-modified flag logic and tenant scoping, with v2 containing dead code and potential assistido reset loss.

Sedation (taxa_uso_sedacao) represented inconsistently across indicator charts: assistance view plots taxa*100 (%), infection-control view plots dias_sedacao (days), both labeled 'Tx. sedacao' despite different units and fields (RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-004, DISCREPANCY, moderate clinical impact per PADIS 2018 sedation minimization).

Frontend/backend Indicador tipo mismatch: backend enumerates 2 valid tipos (interacao_notificacao, entrada_videochamada) with type-specific DRF serializers; TypeScript Models.Indicador only declares 1 literal ('entrada_videochamada'), rendering interacao_notificacao payload untyped and unrepresentable in frontend (RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-027, DISCREPANCY).

Rule distribution: 20 OK + 5 DISCREPANCY + 1 AMBIGUOUS + 1 unverifiable by design (UI formulas). Verdict: 21 NOT_APPLICABLE (display logic), 3 UNVERIFIABLE (percentage math), 1 VERIFIED (TLP conversion), 2 DISCREPANCY (sedation units, tipo enum). Type distribution: 4 formula + 3 threshold + 3 decision-tree + 8 workflow + 6 validation + 3 other.

load_bearing_rules.what: Alert-color decision tree (ASSISTIDO>VERMELHO>AMARELO>NEUTRO) gates dashboard card state
Alert-share percentage formula (part/whole*100) for progress bar segments
Assisted-share formula gates ASSISTIDO override; edge case: 0 if zero yellow+red alerts
Micro-indicator mapping: DVA flag mapped to 'noradrenalina', overstating specificity vs Surviving Sepsis 2021
etl_schema v1: incremental Tasy sync (30-day watermark, OR-flag logic, americashealth tenant)
novo_etl_schema v2: full-scan Tasy sync (flag overwrite bug, homecare fallback, dead except clause)
TLP standardized mortality % conversion (ratio*100, monthly aggregation) — VERIFIED
KPI hierarchy: DashboardItem shape applies uniformly across empresa/estabelecimento/setor levels
Sedation unit drift: % (assistenciais) vs days (controle_infeccao), same label — moderate clinical impact
Indicador tipo mismatch: backend enums 2 types, frontend only types 1 (interacao_notificacao unrepresentable)

systemic_issues.note: Same label despite differing units/fields, moderate clinical impact
Backend accepts 2 tipos, frontend types 1; interacao_notificacao unrepresentable
DashboardItem uses 4 levels (adds LARANJA), other alerts use 3 levels
v2 overwrites per iteration (not OR-accumulates), loses earlier changes
Duplicate except clause at same try level, never executes
Generic vasoactive flag labeled specifically, conflicts with Surviving Sepsis specificity
tx_mortalidade=0 hidden by truthy check, but numeric fields use not-null check
Failures pprint() only, no raise/alert, batch continues with data loss invisibility
v1 uses 30-day filter, v2 full-scans all rows every run — performance concern

intensicare_v2_domains.evidence: Dashboard KPI hierarchy, macro-indicator rollup, ETL orchestration, data integration framework
Alert color decision tree, progress bar rendering, occupancy visualization, indicator tile display filters
Data validation, type safety gaps (frontend/backend mismatch), assistido reset logic, watermark integrity
Micro-indicator mapping (ventilacao_mecanica, sedacao, hemodialise, noradrenalina), clinical scoring components
Hierarchical indicator rollup, multi-level sector/establishment/company aggregation, nested dashboard structures
Legacy Tasy-direct ETL (two divergent versions), v1/v2 duplication, dead code, hardcoded tenant references

invasive_procedures: Punção de Acesso Venoso Central Mono Lúmen
Punção de Acesso Venoso Central Duplo Lúmen
Punção de Acesso Venoso Central Triplo Lúmen
Implante de Cateter Venoso Central Por Punção - Cvc
Implante de Cateter Venoso Central Para Hemodialise
Colocação De Cateter Venoso Central Ou Portocath
Passagem de Sonda Vesical de Demora - 2 Vias
Passagem de Sonda Vesical de Demora - 3 Vias

constraints.text: Alert color decision precedence is strict and unambiguous: ASSISTIDO 100% ⊃ VERMELHO ⊃ AMARELO ⊃ NEUTRO with specific tiebreaker rules (VERMELHO preferred on count ties over AMARELO).

Every indicator chart field with a 0 value (e.g., RASS 0 = alert & calm, tempo_internacao 0 days, mortalidade_esperada 0%) MUST be displayable and not hidden by falsy checks; only null/undefined should hide.

Vasoactive drug mapping MUST distinguish between generic DVA flag and specific norepinephrine dosing; conflating them violates Surviving Sepsis 2021 specificity for norepinephrine as first-line agent.
constraints.source_ref: RULE-INDICADORES-ETL-012, Evans L et al. JAMA 2016; SSC 2021

constraints.text: Indicador tipo enumeration MUST be identical and synchronized between backend model (choices enum) and frontend TypeScript union literal; both tipos (interacao_notificacao, entrada_videochamada) must be typeable from frontend.

open_questions: Is LARANJA alert level ever produced server-side (RULE-007) or dead code?
Which sedation representation is canonical: % vs days (RULE-004)? Verify against PADIS 2018.
Root cause of criterio-modified flag overwrite in v2 (RULE-016): deliberate or regression from v1 OR-logic?
Does URL template bug (RULE-019) cause 404 or backend tolerance?
